_comment: Expected outcomes of fits.validate.verify over the conformance goldens. Consumed by test/golden.zig. 'valid' files must produce zero .err findings; each 'malformed' entry must produce the listed finding (hdu is 1-based, matching validate.Finding.hdu).

malformed.why: BLANK keyword is only meaningful for a positive (integer) BITPIX (FITS 4.0 §4.4.2.5); this image is BITPIX -32.
